creator: yasi@yasi.to
text:
Thank you Fumiyoshi.

I add one more changes.

- Use static pkg-plist
- Change USE_PYTHON
- Change pkg-descr about license.


diff -urN /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/Makefile
/usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/Makefile	Mon Oct 17 02:12:14 2005
+++ /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/Makefile	Sat Oct 21 09:07:26 2006
@@ -6,9 +6,10 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	jaMailHost
-PORTVERSION=	0.3.3
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.4
 CATEGORIES=	japanese www zope
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www005.upp.so-net.ne.jp/nakagami/Download/
+EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz

 MAINTAINER=	yasi@yasi.to
 COMMENT=	A Zope hotfix Product to send mail in Japanese
@@ -16,13 +17,12 @@
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/japanese.pth:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/pycodec-zope
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/japanese.pth:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/pycodec-zope

-USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYTHON?=	-2.4
 USE_ZOPE=	yes
 DIST_SUBDIR=	zope

 ZOPEPRODUCTNAME=${PORTNAME}

-PLIST=		${WRKDIR}/pkg-plist
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${ZOPEPRODUCTNAME}

 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
@@ -31,17 +31,6 @@

 do-build:
 	-@${PYTHON_CMD} ${PYTHON_LIBDIR}/compileall.py ${WRKSRC}/
-
-pre-install:
-	@${RM} -f ${PLIST}
-	@${TOUCH} ${PLIST}
-	@cd ${WRKDIR} ;\
-	for f in `${FIND} ${ZOPEPRODUCTNAME} -type f`; do \
-		${ECHO_CMD} %%ZOPEPRODUCTDIR%%/$${f} >> ${PLIST}; \
-	done; \
-	for d in `${FIND} -d ${ZOPEPRODUCTNAME} -type d`; do \
-		${ECHO_CMD} @dirrm %%ZOPEPRODUCTDIR%%/$${d} >> ${PLIST}; \
-	done; \

 do-install:
 	@${MKDIR} ${ZOPEBASEDIR}/${ZOPEPRODUCTDIR}/
diff -urN /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/distinfo
/usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/distinfo	Sun Jan 22 21:39:12 2006
+++ /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/distinfo	Sat Oct 21 09:08:13 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (zope/jaMailHost-0.3.3.tar.gz) = 57179053acf4cf765c7ecc388b71dc1f
-SHA256 (zope/jaMailHost-0.3.3.tar.gz) =
0d8a78ea871b6aff995f0dc94dd6d1412962805056f98db7d0a8f8bd64c5319d
-SIZE (zope/jaMailHost-0.3.3.tar.gz) = 2782
+MD5 (zope/jaMailHost-0.4.4.tgz) = 958363feb024a8b6e4b2c4ac01211573
+SHA256 (zope/jaMailHost-0.4.4.tgz) =
60cfc949cc49c544dd3d7ad09513e517af162c5a112b7ae6a519676a212994b0
+SIZE (zope/jaMailHost-0.4.4.tgz) = 3661
diff -urN /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/pkg-descr
/usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/pkg-descr
--- /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/pkg-descr	Sat May 29 23:05:53 2004
+++ /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/pkg-descr	Tue Mar 14 23:36:19 2006
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 but can not send Japanese mail correctly.
 This "jaMailHost" product will solve this problem.

-Its license is ZPL 2.0.
+Its license is ZPL 2.1.

 WWW: http://www005.upp.so-net.ne.jp/nakagami/tips/jaMailHost.html

diff -urN /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/pkg-message
/usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/pkg-message
--- /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/pkg-message	Sat May 29 23:05:53 2004
+++ /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/pkg-message	Tue Mar 14 23:35:53 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 To complete the installation of jaMailHost

 - Restart Zope.  This may be done from the Zope Control Panel.
+
diff -urN /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/pkg-plist
/usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost.old/pkg-plist	Thu Jan  1 09:00:00 1970
+++ /usr/ports/japanese/zope-jamailhost/pkg-plist	Tue Mar 14 23:35:28 2006
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+%%ZOPEPRODUCTDIR%%/jaMailHost/README.ja
+%%ZOPEPRODUCTDIR%%/jaMailHost/__init__.py
+%%ZOPEPRODUCTDIR%%/jaMailHost/__init__.pyc
+%%ZOPEPRODUCTDIR%%/jaMailHost/version.txt
+@dirrm %%ZOPEPRODUCTDIR%%/jaMailHost
